title: VoidedPurchase
description: A purchase that has been voided (cancelled, refunded, or charged back).

purchaseToken.description: The token which uniquely identifies the purchase.

purchaseTimeMillis.description: Time at which the purchase was made (milliseconds since Epoch).

voidedTimeMillis.description: Time at which the purchase was voided (milliseconds since Epoch).

orderId.description: The order ID associated with the voided purchase.

voidedSource.description: The source of the voiding. 0 = User, 1 = Developer, 2 = Google.

voidedReason.description: The reason for voiding. 0 = Other, 1 = Remorse, 2 = Not received, 3 = Defective, 4 = Accidental purchase, 5 = Fraud, 6 = Friendly fraud, 7 = Chargeback.

voidedQuantity.description: The voided quantity as related to multi-quantity purchases.
